genre_refs: Theodore Roosevelt equestrian portrait (Tade Styka 'Colonel Roosevelt' painting)
description: Poster built on an oil painting of a man on horseback, in painterly brushwork. The man has a mustache and wears a tan and khaki riding uniform and a broad-brimmed hat, mounted on a dark horse, against a grey-blue sky and dusty ground. Across the bottom, a translucent dark band carries large white serif capital text: 'PATRIOTISM, NOT GLOBALISM'. A small circular gold seal is centered just above the text.
